---
title: "About"
---

## Background

I'm currently completing an MSc in [Programme Name] at [University], focused
on [areas — e.g. statistical modelling, machine learning, data engineering].
This site hosts the coursework, projects and personal analyses I've built
along the way.

## Education

**MSc [Programme Name]**, [University] — [Start year]–[End year]
: Relevant modules: [Module 1], [Module 2], [Module 3]

**BSc/BA [Previous Degree]**, [University] — [Years]

## Experience

**[Job Title]**, [Company] — [Dates]
: One or two lines on what you did and the impact.

## Tools & technologies

Python (pandas, scikit-learn, matplotlib), R (tidyverse, ggplot2, caret),
SQL, Git, Quarto, Jupyter, [anything else relevant].

## Resume

[Download my CV](files/cv.pdf) *(add a PDF to a `files/` folder and update
this link, or remove the line if you'd rather not host it publicly)*
